payload.answer: Committed only explicitly supported facts: Sam no longer works at Goldman, joined Point72, still listens to Bill Evans, is lately more into early Coltrane, and is open to discussing AI infra with Daniele.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; facts are attributed only to explicitly named speakers and entities.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately has been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam is open to catching up with Daniele about AI infra and asked Daniele to send an article.

details: Employment update should supersede any prior current-employer memory stating Sam is still at Goldman.
No unsupported details were added about the article or the AI infra discussion.
Ambiguous reference 'that article' was not resolved to a specific article.
